focus: Keep it easy today: walk, mobility, hydration, and protein. Avoid stacking intensity on short/poor sleep.
Today’s limiting signal is short/poor sleep, not HRV; bias toward recovery unless you feel unusually fresh.
Log today’s food and water when convenient so the nutrition card stops falling back to the last logged meal.
Rollback to a sanitized public view is scheduled for July 3, 2026.
displayNotes: Use cards for scanability on iPhone: one primary number, status pill, and 2–3 details.
Use baseline/range visualization for HRV because personal baseline matters more than population comparison.
Use progress bars for readiness, sleep score, Body Battery, steps, intensity minutes, and nutrition.
Use 7-day trends for movement and resting metrics so one bad day does not dominate.
This update used direct Garmin API calls because the scheduled agent run failed before producing a dashboard update.
